revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with 'whitelist = { basic_arguments = { ['accessdate'] = true, ['access-date'] = true, ['agency'] = true, ['airdate'] = true, ['archivedate'] = tr...'
Protected Module:Citation/CS1/Whitelist: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template or Lua module]] ([Edit=Block all non-admin users] (indefinite) [Move=Block all non-admin users] (indefinite))
Synch from sandbox; Migrate cite thesis;
Sync from sandbox; streamlined deprecated parameter detection;
Sync from sandbox; adds support for cite speech and cite podcast;
Protected "[[Module:Citation/CS1/Whitelist]]": highly visible module ([Edit=Allow only autoconfirmed users] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only autoconfirmed users] (indefinite))
Changed protection settings for "[[Module:Citation/CS1/Whitelist]]": Highly visible template ([Edit=Allow only administrators] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only administrators] (indefinite))
Reverted to revision 8742195 by Trappist the monk. ([[WP:TW|TW]])

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
